permissionDenied: Your account does not have permission to access this resource
title: System Settings
loadFailedDescription: Check the backend service or network connection, then try again.
pageDescription: Manage filing info, security policies, email delivery, third-party login, and passkeys.

overview.title: System Settings Overview
overview.description: Review core site configuration and open a section from the navigation.
overview.hint: Configuration changes take effect immediately for sign-in, registration, and notifications.

beian.title: Filing Information
beian.description: Configure the filing numbers shown in the login page footer. Leave blank to hide.
beian.icpHelp: MIIT ICP filing number; links to the official MIIT lookup page.
beian.policeHelp: Public-security network filing number; links to the official lookup page.

security.title: Security Policies
security.description: Control login and registration security switches. Changes take effect immediately.
security.registrationHelp: When off, new users cannot self-register accounts.
security.captchaHelp: When on, login and registration require an image captcha.
security.passwordResetHelp: When off, users cannot recover passwords via email.
security.passwordMaxAgeHelp: Set to 0 for passwords that never expire. When greater than 0, users must update expired passwords on login.
security.passkeyHelp: When on, users can log in passwordless with fingerprint, face, or a security key.
security.twoFactorRequiredHelp: When on, users without 2FA must bind an authenticator before accessing the backend.

smtp.title: Email Service (SMTP)
smtp.description: Used for verification codes, password resets, etc. Leave password blank to keep it unchanged.
smtp.enabledHelp: When off, the system will not send any emails.
smtp.passwordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current password
smtp.useTlsHelp: Port 465 usually requires TLS; port 587 usually uses STARTTLS.
smtp.testRecipientPlaceholder: Enter the address to receive the test email
smtp.testSuccess: Test email sent, please check the inbox
smtp.testFailed: Failed to send test email, please check the configuration

oauth.title: Third-party Login
oauth.description: Configure and enable each provider individually. Leave Client Secret blank to keep it unchanged.
oauth.clientSecretPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current secret

passkey.title: Passkey Management
passkey.description: Passkeys allow passwordless login with fingerprint, face, or a security key. Adding or removing a passkey requires an email verification code.
passkey.adding: Follow the prompt to complete verification…
passkey.deleteConfirm: Delete this passkey? You will no longer be able to log in with it.
passkey.unsupported: This browser does not support Passkeys (WebAuthn)
passkey.disabled: Passkey login is disabled in system security policies

profile.loadFailedTitle: Failed to load your account center
profile.loadFailedDescription: Check the network or backend service, then try again.

account.codeSent: A verification code has been sent to your email
account.codeTip: For account security, this action requires an email verification code.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.notice: After changing, all current sessions will be invalidated and you must log in again.
changePassword.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
changePassword.mismatch: The two passwords do not match
changePassword.success: Password changed, please log in again

changeEmail.title: Change Email
changeEmail.notice: Current email: {{email}}. The code is sent to the new email and is valid for 5 minutes.
changeEmail.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
changeEmail.codeSent: Verification code sent to the new email

oauthBindings.title: Linked Accounts
oauthBindings.description: Link a third-party account for quick sign-in. To avoid lockout, you cannot unlink your only login method if no local password is set.
oauthBindings.noProviders: No third-party login providers are enabled
oauthBindings.popupBlocked: Popup blocked. Please allow popups and try again.

users.subtitle: Manage platform users: create, edit, reset passwords, and batch import/export.
users.importUsersFormat: Fill in every field in the template. The first row must contain username, nickname, phone, email, role, and password headers; enter one complete user per row.
users.invalidImportFile: Please upload a valid user import file
users.invalidImportData: The import file is invalid. Check its headers and data rows.
users.searchPlaceholder: Search username, nickname, phone, or email
users.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number
users.usernameInvalid: Username may contain only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
users.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
users.deleteConfirm: Delete the {{count}} selected users? This cannot be undone.
users.resetHint: Set a common new password for the {{count}} selected users.
users.passwordComplexity: Password must contain both letters and numbers
users.disableTwoFactorHint: Disabling clears the user's two-factor secret and recovery codes. The user can bind two-factor authentication again themselves.

loginLogs.deleteConfirm: Delete the selected {{count}} login log(s)? This cannot be undone.

roles.searchPlaceholder: Search role code, name, or description
roles.roleCodeHint: The role code cannot be changed after creation and must not contain spaces or dots
roles.roleInvalid: Role code must not contain spaces or dots
roles.deleteConfirm: Delete role "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

radius.manage: Manage RADIUS users, NAS devices, profiles and sessions

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: Generate a code with an authenticator app and verify it at login for extra security.
twoFactor.manualEntry: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:
twoFactor.disableNotice: After disabling, login will no longer require a code. Enter the verification code sent to your bound email to confirm.
twoFactor.forceNotice: Your organization requires two-factor authentication. Set it up to continue.
twoFactor.forcePanelHint: Scan the QR code and enter the authenticator code. Verification starts automatically after 6 digits.
twoFactor.forceStepAuthenticator: Bind this account with an authenticator app.
twoFactor.forceStepAutoVerify: The code is verified automatically once all 6 digits are entered.
twoFactor.forcedDisableHint: Two-factor is required by policy and cannot be disabled.
twoFactor.totpHint: Supports standard TOTP apps such as Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, and 1Password.
twoFactor.autoVerifyHint: Enter the 6-digit code to verify automatically.
twoFactor.preferredMethodHelp: Choose the method to prioritize for two-factor login. When passkey is selected, signing in with a passkey completes directly without entering a code.
twoFactor.recoveryNotice: Download or copy these recovery codes now and keep them safe. Each code can be used only once to sign in when you cannot use your authenticator app.
twoFactor.recoveryConfirm: I have saved my recovery codes
